title: The Rish Talks Saiyaara Album, Mohit Suri & Jubin Nautiyal At Showsha Reel Awards 2026
description: The Rish, composer of the banger Barbaad from the Mohit Suri directorial Saiyaara, got super candid on the Showsha Reel Awards red carpet. He revealed how Mohit Suri approaches him like a true musician, talking about the bases and all the technicalities. He also shared that they were confident the track was going to be a chartbuster. Watch the full conversation right here!
